label: VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers

node.label: VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers
node.definition: VQ-VAE maps continuous encoder outputs to entries in a learned discrete codebook, turning images, audio, or other modalities into reusable tokens.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers is modeled as depending on Autoencoders, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units and feeding downstream nodes such as Multimodal foundation models.
examples: atlas downstream link to Multimodal foundation models
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Autoencoders, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers has a `specializes` dependency on Autoencoders with `core` strength.
In this atlas graph, VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers has a `represents_with` dependency on Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units with `core` strength.
In this atlas graph, VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers has a `represents_with` dependency on Embeddings & distributed representations with `common` strength.

In this atlas graph, VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Reconstruction objectives because Reconstruction objectives is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.
